inputs.label: Total Height
inputs.businessContext: Subject's total standing height (normally without shoes, but if measured with shoes, include shoe height to subtract).

inputs.label: Sitting Height
inputs.businessContext: Subject's sitting height (from seat surface to top of head).

inputs.label: Shoe Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of shoe heel/platform. Default 0 if measured barefoot.

inputs.label: Seat Compression
inputs.businessContext: Compression depth of seat cushion. Default 0 if measured on hard surface.
